title: Make a recommendation report
subtitle: Recommend with context and reason.
overview: A recommendation should mention who it is for.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I would recommend this option to...
I would not recommend it if...

items.es: Recomendaría esta aplicación a estudiantes que quieren hablar más.
items.en: I would recommend this app to students who want to speak more.

items.es: Es especialmente útil para personas que necesitan ejemplos claros.
items.en: It is especially useful for people who need clear examples.

items.es: No la recomendaría si alguien solo quiere memorizar reglas.
items.en: I would not recommend it if someone only wants to memorize rules.

items.es: La recomiendo porque combina lectura, audio y repetición.
items.en: I recommend it because it combines reading, audio, and repetition.

items.es: En general, me parece una herramienta práctica.
items.en: In general, it seems like a practical tool to me.
